sections.paragraph:
Original: מחלת

Transliteration: machălath

Phonetic: makh-al-ath'

BDB Definition:

  1. Mahalath
    1. found in headings of Psa 53:1-6 and Ps 81
      1. meaning dubious, probably a catchword in a song giving name to tune

Origin: from H2470

TWOT entry: 623h or 655c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
